text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: F-finally... I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The top... I've reached the top—the 3,600-meter
peak!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Fellow classmates of the nation, did you see
that?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
This is the feat of a class representative! Behold,
a race to imitate!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I! AM! OVERWHELMED WITH EMOTIONS!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O relishes in her emotions for a
while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the road back from the Centaur Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh. The breeze is a lot cooler now.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I guess it'll be fall soon... Summer was quite
eventful this year, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit odd saying this myself, but I've become
quite the formidable runner!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I did just run a complete 3,600 meters! Heheh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Is this about my next race?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's go at once! This time of year it has to be the
autumn Tenno Sho, or—
choice_data_list: That's right, next up is the Sprinters Stakes!
That's right, next up is the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just how well will she play to her strengths? I want
to see her put it to test!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Wait, again?! That's the sprint-iest sprint of them all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Why are you making me run a sprint again when I
just ran 3,600 meters?!
choice_data_list: But Nishino Flower will be there.
But Nishino Flower will be there.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Did you say Flower, the one and only racer I've
faced in many a fierce battle?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hngh! I won't deny it, I have thought of racing
against her many a time!
choice_data_list: She's a perfect match to test your skills!
She's a perfect match to test your skills!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: That's right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I challenge Flower with my 3,600-meter speed,
I wonder just how far I could take it... I'm
intrigued!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I accept! But this time will be my last, okay?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Let's go for the Sprinters Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to challenge the Sprinters
Stakes a second time!
